title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CMA CGM India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CMA CGM India
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Fleet Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
